entity: Kobe Bryant 81 PTS vs Toronto Raptors on 2006-01-22 (LAL 122-104, 2nd-highest single-game point total in NBA history)

query_target.sql: SELECT full_name, team_abbreviation, CAST(game_date AS VARCHAR) AS game_date, pts, min, fgm, fga, fg3m FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE full_name = 'Kobe Bryant' AND game_date = '2006-01-22' AND pts = 81

notes: analytics_player_game_complete starts at 1996-11-01; the Kobe 81 game is well within coverage. BBR's box-score URL uses the home team (LAL) as the suffix.
